attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks exploiting breakaway group dysfunction or after altitude training blocks, targeting moments 50+ km from finish on undulating terrain with climbing components before key circuits or decisive climbs.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways; attacks are individually initiated rather than team-orchestrated, capitalizing on tactical situations where rival teams must respond and expend resources.
terrain_preference: Undulating parcours with sustained climbing efforts that allow attrition through tempo rather than explosive gradients. Thrives on courses where climbing ability forces work from stronger teams before finale.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest reliance on solo efforts may expose him when peloton has strong numerical chase motivation; success depends on forcing rivals to commit domestiques early.
key_patterns: Executes long-range solo attacks from breakaways, forcing peloton's hand at critical race moments (2 instances)
Targets pre-finale climbing sections to exhaust rivals' domestique support before decisive terrain (2 instances)
Benefits from altitude training camps with immediate race application in stamina-demanding efforts (1 confirmed, tactical fit)
Identifies dysfunctional group dynamics as attack trigger rather than waiting for terrain catalysts (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: altitude training investment in 2023 showed immediate tactical dividends with increased capacity for sustained solo efforts at Monument level
